title: gentiana scabra f. stenophylla
intro: Gentiana scabra f. stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leaved gentian or Japanese gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gentiana scabra f. stenophylla include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures.
